stemHtml: How is the reading of the Airspeed Indicator (ASI) affected when ice blocks the static air ports?

options.a: The Airspeed Indicator shows an increase in speed with a decrease in altitude.
options.b: The on board emergency system switches automatically to the standby static pressure port.
options.c: The Airspeed Indicator shows a decrease in speed with a decrease in altitude.
options.d: The Airspeed Indicator no longer indicates any change in speed.
